title: Sweet Deceptions
writer: Claude Brulé, Francesco Ghedini, Alberto Lattuada
actors: Christian Marquand, Catherine Spaak, Jean Sorel
plot: Francesca, a 17-year old school girl, has a vivid dream of making love to Enrico, a 37-year old divorced architect and family friend. She turns her dream into reality by meeting Enrico during a regular school day.
